hard_reset_desc: The local save will be deleted. This action is irreversible.
city_panel_no_selection: No city selected. Click on a city on the map.
building_market_desc: Allows trading and generates 1 gold every 60s.
building_market_desc_maxlvl2:
Allows trading and generates 1 gold every 60s.
Lvl.2: reduces trade rate for one resource to 4:1.
building_market_desc_maxlvl3:
Allows trading and generates 1 gold every 60s.
Lvl.2: reduces trade rate for one resource to 4:1.
Lvl.3: enables automatic overflow trading.
building_seaport_desc:
Allows gathering food from water.
Lvl.3: generates a random basic resource every 10s.
Each additional level reduces this delay by 20%.
building_forge_desc: Creates tools to improve other production buildings
building_library_desc: Increases knowledge production and allows upgrades
building_townhall_desc: Allows manual harvest for basic resources. Provides storage space. Unlock more buildings.
building_buildersguild_desc: Allows construction automation. Available at Capital level (4).
building_buildersguild_desc_1: Auto-builds a road (distance ≤ 1) every 5s. Reduces road cost by 1 Wood/Brick.
building_buildersguild_desc_2: Auto-builds a road (distance ≤ 2) every 5s. Reduces road cost by 2 Wood/Brick.
building_buildersguild_desc_3: Auto-builds a road (distance ≤ 3) every 5s. Reduces road cost by 4 Wood/Brick.
building_buildersguild_desc_4: Also auto-builds outposts every 10s (pays construction cost). See Automation tab.
automation_military_reinforcement_desc: Transfers soldiers from full cities to nearby less-defended ones
building_harvestersguild_desc: Unique building. Unlocks level 5 for production buildings and automates their construction. Available at Capital level (4).
building_harvestersguild_desc_1: Unlocks level 5 (Sawmill, Brickworks, Quarry, Mill). Auto-upgrades production buildings every 10s.
building_harvestersguild_desc_4: Auto-upgrades production buildings every 2.5s. Maximum speed.
tooltip_requires_3_production_level4: ⚠ Requires 3 production buildings (Sawmill, Brickworks, Quarry or Mill) at level 4 in this city
tooltip_requires_forge_level4: ⚠ Requires a level 4 Forge in this city
building_militaryacademy_desc: Increases soldier capacity by +5 per level and soldier production speed by +25% per level. Unlocked via prestige.
building_traderguild_desc: Unique building. Unlocks level 4 for Markets and automates their construction/upgrade. Requires a Market and a level 4 Seaport. Unlocked via prestige.
building_traderguild_desc_1: Unlocks level 4 for Markets. Auto-builds/upgrades Markets every 10s.
building_artisansguild_desc: Unique building. Unlocks level 5 for the Forge and automates construction of Forges and Warehouses. Available at Capital level (4).
building_artisansguild_desc_1: Unlocks level 5 for the Forge. Auto-builds/upgrades Forges and Warehouses every 10s.
building_academy_desc: Unique building. Automates Library construction and increases research speed by 100%. Unlocked via the Academy prestige.
tooltip_requires_library_level4: ⚠ Requires a level 4 Library in this city
building_watchtower_desc: Reveals hexes within a radius of 2 around the city.
building_imperialport_desc: Unique imperial building. Required to trigger Prestige. Unlocks a new run for your civilization.
tooltip_imperial_port_prerequisites: Requires a Town Hall lv.4 + Seaport lv.4
building_glassworks_desc: Automatically produces glass in deserts. Requires Town Hall lvl. 2. Unlocked via the Laboratory prestige.
building_laboratory_desc: Produces 10 research pts every 10s. Cost: 1 Gold per batch. Unlocked via the Laboratory prestige.
building_palisade_desc: Protects the city against bandit resource theft.
building_barracks_desc: Allows troop training. Unlocked via the Barracks prestige.
building_barracks_desc_1: Produces 1 soldier every 30s (max 5). Soldiers attack adjacent bandits.
building_barracks_desc_2: Produces 1 soldier every 30s (max 10). Soldiers attack adjacent bandits.
prestige_tooltip_dragon_bonus: +5 base points per dragon defeated this run
prestige_tooltip_prestige_gain_bonus: Final multiplier on prestige points earned
prestige_tooltip_monster_bonus: ×1.2 multiplier when no monsters remain on the surface
prestige_tooltip_wonder_bonus: Multiplier: Wonder level × hours played (rounded up)
tooltip_requires_seaport_4: ⚠ Requires a level 4 Seaport in this city
tooltip_requires_market: ⚠ Requires a Market in this city
tooltip_unique_city_limit: ⚠ This city already has a unique building
timecontrol_bank_tooltip:
Offline time bank
Time accumulated while offline or paused
Used for speeding up game.
about_inspired: Inspired by the famous Catan boardgame
road_enemy_protected:
⚠ Enemy influence zone
Destroy the enemy city to build here
prestige_tooltip_unlocks_maritime_routes: Unlocks maritime routes (connections via coastal waters)
hex_tooltip_treasure_trove: 💰 Treasure — building an outpost here gives 10 Gold
tech_rapid_construction_desc: Defensive buildings built or upgraded also increase current defense
tech_orpaillage_desc: 10% chance for mines to produce gold in addition to ore
tech_military_tactics_desc: +15% unit production speed, +1 city attack range
event_bandit_body: This bandit blocks harvest on its hex and may steal your resources.
event_bandit_defeated_body: Your soldiers drove off the bandit. Harvesting resumes normally.
event_treasure_found_body: Build an outpost on this hex to claim it and gain +10 Gold.
event_bandit_hideout_body: This hideout blocks harvest and periodically spawns bandits. Destroy it!
event_bandit_hideout_destroyed_body: Your soldiers razed the bandit hideout.
event_dragon_discovered_body: A dragon has landed on this island. It attacks cities at long range and regenerates HP!
event_dragon_defeated_body: Your soldiers managed to slay the dragon.
event_rats_body: Rats have infested one of your hexes. Harvest is blocked until they are eliminated.
event_rats_defeated_body: Your soldiers drove out the rats. Harvest will resume shortly.
event_civilization_discovered_body: A new civilization has been spotted in your vicinity.
event_soldier_starved_body: Some soldiers died from lack of food. Increase your food stockpile.
event_wonder_discovered_body: A wonder stands on this hex. Harvesting here is impossible.
tech_grand_architecture_desc: +1 max level Market, Library and Barracks
tech_efficient_trading_desc: +1 bonus gold per 10 units sold at once
tech_steel_weapons_desc: Unlocks the Steel Weapons option for Barracks: produces 5 soldiers at once in exchange for 1 extra Steel per cycle.
tooltip_steel_weapons_checkbox: Steel Weapons: costs 1 extra Steel, produces 5 soldiers at once
tooltip_toggle_steel_weapons: Activate / Deactivate Steel Weapons for all barracks
tech_advanced_tactics_desc: Unlocks automatic reinforcement between allied cities
tech_advanced_strategy_desc: Unlocks automatic attack on nearby enemy cities
tooltip_wonder_surface_only: ⚠ Wonders can only be built on the surface
wonder_select_hex: Choose a hex adjacent to one of your cities
event_wonder_placed_body: Your civilization has laid the first stone of a Wonder.
task_harvest_wood_desc: Click on a forest hex adjacent to your city to harvest wood.
task_harvest_brick_desc: Click on a hill hex adjacent to your city to harvest bricks.
task_build_seaport_desc: Gather enough resources, click on your city and build a Seaport.
task_build_sawmill_desc: Gather enough resources, click on your city and build a Sawmill.
task_build_brickworks_desc: Gather enough resources, click on your city and build a Brickworks.
task_build_first_road_desc: Click on a free edge around your city to build a road.
task_harvest_food_desc: Click on a meadow hex adjacent to a city to harvest food.
tutorial_step_harvest_desc: Select a hex adjacent to your city and tap it to harvest resources. Forest hexes give Wood, hill hexes give Bricks.
tutorial_step_build_desc: Tap your city to open the build menu. Select an available building and construct it.
tutorial_step_road_desc: Build roads to expand your territory. To found a new city, you need to reach a vertex at least 3 roads away from your first city.
task_build_second_city_desc: Extend your roads 3 segments from your city, then click a free vertex to found a new city.
task_upgrade_production_level2_desc: Click on a city, select a production building (Sawmill, Brickworks…) and press Upgrade.
task_build_10_cities_desc: Extend your road network and click on free vertices to found new cities.
task_build_5_libraries_desc: Gather enough resources and build a Temple in each city.
task_build_5_palisades_desc: Gather enough resources and build a Palisade in each city.
task_seaport_townhall_level4_desc: Click on a city, select the building and press Upgrade until level 4.
task_seaport_level4_desc: Click on a city with a Seaport, select it and upgrade it to level 4.
task_townhall_level4_desc: Click on a city with a Town Hall, select it and upgrade it to level 4.
task_build_imperial_port_desc: Select a city with a level 4 Seaport and a level 4 Town Hall, then open the Unique Buildings tab.
task_build_2_warehouses_desc: Gather enough resources and build a Warehouse in 2 different cities.
task_build_1_warehouse_desc: Gather enough resources, click on your city and build a Warehouse.
task_build_market_desc: Click on your city and build a Market to unlock trading.
task_trade_10_gold_desc: Open the Sell tab in Trade and sell resources for gold.
task_build_3_warehouses_desc: Gather enough resources and build a Warehouse in 3 different cities.
tutorial_step_trade_desc: Build a Warehouse to store your resources, then sell resources for gold. Sell 50 resources to obtain 10 gold.
task_reach_20_victory_points_desc: Upgrade Town Halls to level 3 (2 pts), build Temples (1 pt).
task_perform_prestige_desc: Once the Imperial Port is built, click the Prestige button in the main interface.
task_reach_enough_victory_points_desc: Build Temples and Libraries, and upgrade your Town Halls to earn victory points.
tutorial_step_expansion_desc: Build roads to reach new hexes and found new cities to grow your empire.
tutorial_step_empire_desc: Expand your empire by building many cities. The palisades protect your cities from bandits.
tutorial_step_capital_desc: Unlock the Imperial Port by owning a level 4 Seaport and a level 4 Town Hall in the same city. It is a unique building.
tutorial_step_imperial_port_desc: Build the Imperial Port to unlock Prestige and open a new era.
tutorial_step_prestige_desc: Perform a Prestige to restart with permanent bonuses and unlock new possibilities.
tutorial_step_research_desc: Buy the Research vertex in the prestige map to unlock technologies, then start your first research.
task_buy_research_vertex_desc: Open the Prestige tab, buy the Research vertex at the center of the map to unlock technologies.
task_complete_first_research_desc: Open the Research tab, select a technology and wait for it to complete.
task_build_library_level2_desc: Build a Library to earn research points.
task_build_barracks_desc: Unlock the Barracks via the prestige vertex, then build one in one of your cities.
task_buy_barracks_vertex_desc: Buy the Barracks vertex in the prestige map to increase the maximum level of your Barracks.
task_complete_military_buildings_researc: Complete the Military Buildings research to increase the maximum level of your Barracks.
task_build_2_barracks_desc: Build a Barracks in two different cities to have soldiers at multiple points.
task_create_reinforcement_flow_desc: Select a city with a Barracks and set a military flow toward another allied city to send reinforcements.
task_destroy_enemy_city_desc: Attack and destroy a city belonging to another civilization.
task_kill_bandit_desc: Your soldiers can attack and eliminate a bandit on the map.
task_perform_second_prestige_desc: Reach the required victory points again and perform a second prestige.
task_destroy_bandit_hideout_desc: Eliminate all bandits from a hideout to destroy it and increase your prestige gains.
tutorial_step_second_prestige_desc: Perform a second prestige to strengthen your civilization. Bandits and hideouts adjacent to a city with soldiers are attacked automatically — destroying them all increases prestige gains.
tutorial_step_barracks_desc: The Barracks trains soldiers for defense and attack. Unlock it via the prestige vertex or the associated research.
tutorial_step_reinforcement_desc: Link your cities with barracks using reinforcement flows to concentrate your troops where needed.
task_place_wonder_desc: Open the Wonder tab and place it on a hex adjacent to one of your cities.
task_build_wonder_desc: Invest resources into the Wonder until it reaches level 1.
tutorial_step_place_wonder_desc: Place the Wonder on a hex in your territory. That hex is sacrificed: it will never produce resources again.
tutorial_step_wonder_desc: Invest heavily in the Wonder to reach level 1. It will then multiply your prestige points by a bonus that grows with time spent on the island — including time before it was built.
tutorial_step_war_desc: Send your soldiers to attack an enemy city to destroy it. You cannot build next to an enemy city, and contested territories produce nothing.
building_deepestmine_desc: Digs down to the Underworld and opens an underground outpost.
building_smelter_desc: Converts 5 Ore + 2 Wood into 1 Steel every 10s. Unlocked via the Steel Secret prestige.
game_over_line1: All your cities have been destroyed.
corrupt_save_line1: Your save file is unreadable or incompatible.
corrupt_save_line2: Export it to send to support before continuing.
